normalized_title: City of Joondalup Child Care Premises Local Planning Policy
scope_summary: Local planning policy providing development standards for the location, siting and design of child care premises across the whole City of Joondalup, prepared under Schedule 2, Part 2 of the Planning and Development (Local Planning Schemes) Regulations 2015. It restricts child care premises in the Residential zone (must adjoin non-residential uses, max 50 children, max 50% site coverage), requires location on local distributor roads, and sets car/bicycle parking, building height, setback, noise attenuation, landscaping and hours-of-operation standards.

child care premises in the Residential zone

key_numeric_standards.value: 1 per employee plus 5 bays per up to 25 children, sliding to 14 bays for 105+ children

Figure 1 (parking layout diagrams Type 1 / Type 2) not captured in text extraction
